zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Sherman於1526年出生在英國英格蘭艾可分格林時，她的父親Thomas Sherman36歲，母親Jane Waller31歲。她於1547年與John Makin Sr在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1548年在她的家鄉享年22歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Sherman于1526年出生在英国英格兰艾可分格林时，她的父亲Thomas Sherman36岁，母亲Jane Waller31岁。她于1547年与John Makin Sr在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1548年在她的家乡享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Sherman was born in 1526, in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Sherman, was 36 and her mother, Jane Waller, was 31. She married John Makin Sr in 1547, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1548, in her hometown, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Sherman est née en 1526, à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Sherman, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jane Waller, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Makin Sr en 1547, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1548, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Sherman 1526 in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Sherman 36 und ihre Mutter Jane Waller 31. Sie hat 1547 in Essex, England, United Kingdom John Makin Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 22 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Sherman è nata il nel 1526 nel Fingringhoe, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Sherman, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Jane Waller, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Makin Sr nel 1547, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1548, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 22 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Sherman(이)가 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑그링호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Sherman(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Waller(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 John Makin Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 그녀의 고향에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.
